title: Arogans Range 1
technique: Clustered tree trunks and foliage, horizontal sunset bands, and a massive stepped brown mountain use dithered shade transitions.
composition: Trees frame the left foreground, the mountain anchors the right, and a broad open green route stays playable in the center.
pictorial_art: Landscape art uses layered silhouettes and color-cell shading rather than a literal image.
quality: Excellent gameplay scenery: the scenic focal points leave a legible movement corridor.
summary: Gameplay landscape: trees frame a playable valley beneath sunset bands and a huge brown mountain.
